implementation.fix1: AND-of-OR: keyword and category conditions pushed into andClauses[], merged via where.AND
implementation.fix2: page:1 added to all 9 setFilters calls in SearchResults.tsx (5 filter + 4 badge dismiss)
implementation.fix3: Sort label 'Relevance' → 'Best Match', value stays 'relevance' (now explicit case in API)
implementation.fix4: case 'ranking' and case 'relevance' added explicitly in sort switch
implementation.fix5: Post-pagination in-memory re-sort removed (operated on wrong slice)
